agent_assessment.rationale: The question clearly asks for tan(B) from the triangle diagram, and the image is legible enough to identify the right angle at C and side lengths 24, 10, and 26. A human can determine that tan(B)=opposite/adjacent=24/10=2.4, so the sample is semantically understandable.
